concerns: AC2 may need to use manual subscription fallback if no implement worker with PR exists — evidence should note which path was taken
Step 0 agent preservation gate is a hard blocker — if it fails, all ACs are skipped

Session bootstrap delay after dispatch — wait ≥5s before querying session state
Cross-machine routing — machine_id alignment between Envoy listener and shared serve must be verified
